## CONTENT_BLOCK

### Summary
This is a template for urgent water outage notifications. When an actual outage occurs, replace the bracketed text.

### Affected Areas
[Suburbs, zones, or street names – e.g., Budiriro, Glen View, parts of Mufakose]

### Reason for Outage
[Burst main / power failure at Morton Jaffray / planned maintenance / pump failure]

### Expected Restoration Time
[Date and time, e.g., 15 April 2026 at 18:00]

### Instructions for Residents
- Store enough drinking water for 24 hours.
- Do not use the water if it appears brown – let it run for a few minutes after restoration.
- Report any leaks or unusual pressure to 0800 1234.
- For emergency water trucking (vulnerable areas like clinics, schools, old age homes), call the hotline.

### Important Contacts
- Water Emergency Hotline: 0800 1234 (toll‑free) or 0712 345 678 (WhatsApp)
- Morton Jaffray Plant: +263 242 123456
- City of Harare Switchboard: +263 242 789101
